creator: koden@bsdmail.com
text:
~% svn checkout https://svn.FreeBSD.org/doc/head ~/doc
svn: E170013: Unable to connect to a repository at URL 'https://svn.freebsd.org/doc/head'
svn: E000065: Error running context: No route to host

~% svn mkdir --parents ~/doc/es_ES.ISO8859-1/articles/leap-seconds/
svn: E155007: '/usr/home/      /doc/es_ES.ISO8859-1/articles' is not a working copy
